response.global_summary: This 3D dance video features VTubers Tokoyami Towa and Akai Haato performing a choreographed song together. The song is a Japanese vocal track with the lyrical phrase 'tatta hitotsu dake'. The video encompasses one continuous performance throughout the 5 minutes, with varying camera angles, dance choreography, and artistic background shifts.

scenes.description: Tokoyami Towa and Akai Haato perform a choreographed vocal song together. The scene features multiple camera angle changes, dance movements, and changing artistic backgrounds. The song starts at 00:00 and continues throughout the entire 5-minute duration. The lyrics begin with 'Tatta hitotsu dake te ni iretemo nakushitemo...'. Text appears briefly on screen at various points (e.g., at 00:03, 00:06).
